name: Fluted Ceramic Table Lamp: ETL Listed, Cotton/Polyester Shade, No Assembly - Room Essentials™
description:
Top off a entryway console or study table with this Fluted Ceramic Table Lamp from Room Essentials™. This table lamp features a fluted ceramic base with ribbed detailing and a white fabric drum shade that create a rich, elegant ambience. Plus, the one-way light setting with a knob rotary switch allows for easy operation. Perfect on an entryway table or nightstand, this ceramic lamp makes a versatile addition to your space.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
